meta.description: Verified source registry for Flava Pulse newsletter. Each source is categorized, geotagged, and scored for relevance.

temporal_directives.note: Always compare findings against prior newsletter editions. Flag reversals, failures, pivots, and follow-ups.

sources.name: TechCrunch
sources.focus: AI startups, funding rounds, product launches

sources.name: The Verge
sources.focus: Consumer tech, AI products, voice assistants

sources.focus: Deep technical analysis, AI research, open source AI
